creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
- Update to lastest security patchset 20120103 - added max_input_vars directive (default "1000") to prevent attacks based on hash collisions (from PHP 5.4 RC4)

Fix: Apply patch to port. Please remove forbidden mark from port, port is secure, all security patches are applied, if you need you can enable security patches "by default" in Makefile outside of the dialog user choose.

Patch attached with submission follows:
